name: paseo
description: Paseo: voice-controlled development environment with OpenAI Realtime API

scripts.build:daemon: pnpm --filter @getpaseo/highlight run build && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/relay run build && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/server run build && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/cli run build
scripts.typecheck:daemon: pnpm --filter @getpaseo/relay run typecheck && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/server run typecheck && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/cli run typecheck
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm run version:sync-internal && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/app run build:workspace-deps && cd packages/app && cross-env PASEO_WEB_PLATFORM=electron npx expo export --platform web && cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/desktop run build
scripts.cli:mfl: pnpm --filter meow-flow exec node --conditions=source --import tsx src/index.ts
scripts.version: pnpm run version:sync-internal && pnpm run release:prepare && git add -A
scripts.release:check: pnpm run release:prepare && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/highlight run typecheck && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/highlight run build && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/relay run typecheck && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/relay run build && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/server run typecheck && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/server run build && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/cli run typecheck && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/cli run build && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/highlight pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/relay pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/server pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/cli pack --dry-run
scripts.release:publish:dry-run: pnpm --filter @getpaseo/highlight publish --dry-run --access public && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/relay publish --dry-run --access public && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/server publish --dry-run --access public && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/cli publish --dry-run --access public
scripts.release:publish: pnpm --filter @getpaseo/highlight publish --access public && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/relay publish --access public && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/server publish --access public && pnpm --filter @getpaseo/cli publish --access public
scripts.release:beta:patch: pnpm run release:check && pnpm run version:all:beta:patch && pnpm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:minor: pnpm run release:check && pnpm run version:all:beta:minor && pnpm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:major: pnpm run release:check && pnpm run version:all:beta:major && pnpm run release:push
scripts.release:beta:next: pnpm run release:check && pnpm run version:all:beta:next && pnpm run release:push
scripts.release:promote: pnpm run release:check && pnpm run version:all:promote && pnpm run release:publish && pnpm run release:push
scripts.release:patch: pnpm run release:check && pnpm run version:all:patch && pnpm run release:publish && pnpm run release:push
scripts.release:minor: pnpm run release:check && pnpm run version:all:minor && pnpm run release:publish && pnpm run release:push
scripts.release:major: pnpm run release:check && pnpm run version:all:major && pnpm run release:publish && pnpm run release:push
